series_metadata.series_description: Open and closed case files may contain, but not limited to the following documents; reference documents created and maintained in the Professional Conduct Case Management (PCCM) system (i.e. reports relating to BCI/FBI, School district referrals, demographics, credentials, etc.); Investigation reports and documentation; records produced as a result of an investigation (i.e. personnel files, court and police records, children service reports, telephone records, etc.) Notes; Case recommendations and non-Disciplinary Case completion records, and administrative documentation,).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: life of Educator's career. ; Paper: Paper records shredded being scanned and uploaded office’s case management system or office shared drive larger files (e.g. video and audio files, phone records)
